/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/test_file_watcher.dir/test_file_watcher_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_file_watcher.dir/test_file_watcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_file_watcher.dir/__/common/FileWatcherAdapter.cpp.o -o test_file_watcher  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Test.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2
